title: Dian Wang Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Dian Wang Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Dian Wang
PhD Student
PhD in Computer Science ’25
Interdisciplinary Research in Machine Learning and Robotics
When AlphaGo revealed its advanced Go-playing AI in 2016, it was a shock for Dian Wang. Wishing to understand the complexities of artificial intelligence, he entered Khoury College’s PhD program, where he found support among professors for his research at the intersection of machine learning and robotics.
Khoury is very supportive for interdisciplinary research. … I would like to be a good professor like my advisor some day
Dian Wang, PhD in CS ’25
Explore all Khoury stories
